channel.title: AI Interpretability / Developer Tools on RepoIntel 开源情报局
channel.description: Recent content in AI Interpretability / Developer Tools on RepoIntel 开源情报局

item.title: [Score: 80.8] WeZZard/jlens-qwen36
item.description: 本地运行的 Jacobian lens 可视化调试器，针对苹果芯片 4-bit Qwen3.6-27B，通过拟合每层 Jacobian 矩阵揭示模型潜在概念轨迹，而非仅输出 token。
